name: The House
short_description: The House is a new first-person horror and psychological game for the computer. Escape the house where it all began, collect items, weapons and level up. Travel between worlds and time to reach your goal. Go discover the dark secrets of the House where it all began!
detailed_description:
The House is a new PC horror video game focused on solving environmental puzzles, taking you to a house full of secrets and dark magic that will make you shiver in fear!



The game will be divided into multiple parts that will clarify and complete the game's story, and will be added via free updates that will greatly improve the gaming experience. We will make every effort to resolve any game-related issues (gameplay, bugs, story)
Join our Discord server or register on our site to receive a 25% discount code when you launch the game!



The first part will include: at least 3 hours of gameplay, the beginning of the story, many environmental puzzles, combat and much more.

The second part, which will arrive in December, will include: at least another 2 hours of gameplay, the second part of the story, the translation of texts and subtitles into at least 8 different languages, a new zombie multiplayer mode with many different maps and new weapons.
